rows.notes: Numbers in the right-hand column align clearly with the topmost pounds/shillings/pence lines; the pounds '280' and pence '1' are legible. The left-hand description is somewhat ambiguous in handwriting (looks like 'Obita Ordinaria'), so confidence lowered for text.

Amount '27 5 10' is well aligned under the pound/shilling/pence ruling and digits are clear. Description 'Gas lights 1/2 y to Feby 1850' is legible though small; minor uncertainty in the exact fractional-year notation.
Marked 'Do' (ditto). Amount '8 11 0' clearly placed in columns. Handwriting for the word 'Do' is clear; numeric columns pass validation.

rows.description: Mr Falconer 19? tot on 2447.14.2, 3d Costs to July 1850
rows.notes: Amount '6 8 6' reads cleanly in the columns. The long descriptive phrase is heavily abbreviated and the digits/marks in the text are faded/ambiguous (I transcribed as best-fit: 'Mr Falconer 19? tot on 2447.14.2, 3d Costs to July 1850'), so textual confidence is low though numeric reading is solid.
Clear section heading introducing a block of subscription lines. No amounts adjacent to this heading (serves as structural label).
Short description 'Infirmary' is legible beneath the 'Subscriptions' header. Amount '1 1 0' is aligned and clear in the columns.
Description and amount '20 0 0' are both clearly written; vertical alignment with the ruIes is unambiguous.
Entry 'Paddington Do.' (ditto) is reasonably clear. Amount '5 5 0' is clear and valid (shillings <20).
Text 'South Kensington Do' inferred from handwriting; amount '5 5 0' is clearly aligned and legible.
Description is somewhat unclear (appears as 'Little Jew Do' or similar); amount '6 0 0' is clean in the columns.
Place name is written in cursive and could be 'Jarston' or similar; amount '3 3 0' is clearly placed and valid.
Description 'Morton Do' reads well; numeric '5 5 0' is crisply written and aligns with columns.
Handwritten place name closely resembles 'Carrington'; amount '3 3 0' is clear and within valid ranges.
Initial 'L.' and surname 'Withenham' are faint but plausible; '5 5 0' is clear in numeric columns.
Place looks like 'Bensington' or similar; amount '2 2 0' is clearly written and validated against columns.
Place name is quite unclear in the script (transcribed as 'Gwinkar'); amount '5 0 0' is clear, but textual uncertainty reduces confidence.
Phrase looks like 'Poor of Comscar' (or similar parish name); the amount '10 0 0' is crisp and aligns with the pence/shilling lines.
Text 'Diocesan Board of Education' is fairly legible; amount '10 0 0' is clear and validated.
Description is abbreviated and somewhat faded; appears to reference a 'small lump' or 'small lump sum' in the diocese. Amount '5 0 0' is clear.
Phrase 'Widows & Orphans of Clergy' is readable though the trailing 'Do' is abbreviated. Amount '5 0 0' aligns correctly.
'University' and what appears to be 'Marshall' (or 'Marshal') are legible. Amount '2 0 0' is clear in the columns.
Role description is partly unclear ('Pale' might be 'Peal' or 'Pale'); numeric '10 0 0' is clear. Textual ambiguity reduces confidence.
Label 'Corn Prices' readable. Amount '1 19 6' is clearly written and valid (19 shillings < 20).
'Easter Offerings' is reasonably legible; amount '1 1 0' aligns well and is clear.
Handwritten note adjacent to the line but main label 'Parish Rates' is legible. Amount '21 13 4' is clearly placed in the columns; digits read confidently.
Text reads as 'Synodals and Procurations' (handwriting clear enough). Amount '2 16 8' is clear and validated (shillings <20).
Item 'College Gardener - 1st Quarter' is clearly demarcated with amount '7 12 0' legible and correctly aligned with the three money columns.
Second-quarter entry '2nd Do' clear in context. Amount '7 13 9' reads well; pence '9' is unambiguous.
Third-quarter amount '12 15 11' is clearly written and within valid ranges. Description follows the pattern of the gardener quarters and is legible.
Fourth-quarter '7 12 0' is aligned and legible. Description is abbreviated as '4th Do' consistent with previous lines.
Phrase 'Interest on Trusts Deposit' is readable; numeric '6 0 0' is clear and validated.
Section heading 'Open Scholarships - Viz:' is centered and introduces three named scholarship entries beneath; no amounts on the heading line itself.
Name looks like 'Mr Kempe' (handwriting close to 'Kempe' or 'Hempe'); amount '40 0 0' is very clear and aligned under pounds column.
Second scholarship name uncertain (transcribed as 'Mr Wilgels' — could be 'Mr Wilges'/'Mr Witgels'); numeric '40 0 0' is clear, but the name is faint and ambiguous.
Third scholarship name reads like 'Mr Roase' or 'Mr Roase' (handwriting a little stylized); amount '40 0 0' is clearly written and valid.
Final grand total in large script 'L 619 3 7' is very clear and sits inside the total box. Numeric values are unambiguous and validated against column alignment.
